series_metadata.series_title: Contract info for Software, Ticket Security, On-line Ticket Stock, Instant Ticket Vending Machine
series_metadata.series_description: Records includes all bids and proposals submitted by these various vendors including; Request for Proposal (RFP's), Request of Validation, Invitation to Bid, pre-bid conference materials and other relevant information.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain digital copy for six (6) years and one (1) day; review for administrative value, then destroy., Electronic: Delete
